name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the concept explainer: a concept h1, an intuition lead, a mechanics section, a worked example, and a further-reading list. The further-reading array is rendered to bullets before substitution.

slots.description: The one-sentence mental model, framed against the naive approach.
Plain-prose explanation of how the concept works and what it trades off.
A small worked example that makes the concept concrete.
Pointers to follow next, as a bullet list.
